title: Maintenance and Repair of ICT Infrastructure
description: MS TCDC is seeking to engage qualified vendors to carry out maintenance and repairs of critical ICT infrastructure components to enhance the reliability, security, and efficiency of its digital operations. Scope includes: Software Systems (SQL Server, Dynamics NAV, websites), Server Room and Core Equipment, Network Infrastructure, Smart Classrooms, Office Equipment.
eligibility: Valid business license and relevant certifications (Cisco, Microsoft, ITIL). Registered ICT company with at least 3 years experience. Mandatory site visit required.
